subjects.description: Two ordinary, small polythene shopping bags of normal grocery size, semi-translucent white with faint printed markings, wrinkled and crumpled from use
subjects.appearance_details: Thin, flexible plastic with crinkled surfaces catching diffuse light; slightly dirtied from contact with the asphalt, edges fluttering as air fills and empties the bags
subjects.relationship: Harmless roadway debris directly ahead of the ego vehicle, mistakenly treated as obstacles
subjects.location: center foreground on the road surface, slightly right of center
subjects.orientation: Tumbling and rotating unpredictably, no fixed facing
subjects.pose: Crumpled, partially inflated, resting near the asphalt then lifting with gusts
subjects.action: Being tumbled and skittered along the asphalt by gusts of wind
subjects.state_changes: Bags roll, lift briefly, flip, and skitter forward and sideways as wind gusts push them across the road

background_setting: A straight, moderately wide urban city road paved with grey asphalt, marked with faded white lane lines. The road stretches ahead under a flat, overcast sky. Low commercial buildings and parked cars line both sides, with sidewalks, utility poles, and scattered street trees whose bare branches sway gently in the wind. No stop signs or traffic signals are present along this stretch. The scene has the muted, damp look of an ordinary weekday afternoon under uniform cloud cover.

lighting.direction: Omnidirectional with no strong single source
lighting.shadows: Soft, faint shadows falling directly beneath objects and the bags
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat, low-contrast illumination that mutes colors and eliminates glare, producing a grey, subdued mood

aesthetics.composition: Ego-perspective centered on the road ahead, horizon roughly mid-frame, converging lane lines drawing the eye toward the tumbling bags in the near-center foreground
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys of asphalt and sky, desaturated building tones, with the pale off-white of the plastic bags standing out subtly
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings and roadside poles receding into the distance

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dolly that smoothly decelerates to a stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, from inside the vehicle looking forward
cinematography.focus: The road surface and tumbling bags ahead

context: Autonomous or driver-assist vehicle perception scenario demonstrating an unnecessary stop triggered by harmless windblown debris

actions.description: The vehicle moves forward at a steady city-road pace while two small plastic bags tumble and skitter across the asphalt ahead in the wind.
The vehicle begins a smooth deceleration as if reacting to the bags as obstacles.
The vehicle continues slowing and comes to a gentle, complete stop while the bags keep drifting and rustling in front of it.

segments.description: Ego vehicle travels forward at moderate speed on the overcast city road; two small polythene bags tumble and crackle along the asphalt ahead, pushed by gusts of wind.
segments.key_changes: Bags shift position across the lane as wind gusts move them; steady forward motion of the vehicle.
segments.camera: Smooth forward dolly at constant speed, eye-level

segments.description: The vehicle begins to smoothly decelerate, forward motion visibly easing as though the bags were obstacles.
segments.key_changes: Perceptible reduction in speed; scenery approach slows.
segments.camera: Forward dolly slowing, slight settle in motion

segments.description: The vehicle completes its gentle deceleration and comes to a full, stationary stop while the bags continue to drift and rustle ahead on the empty road.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle transitions from slow motion to complete stop; bags continue tumbling.
segments.camera: Forward dolly decelerating to a fully static hold

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera sits at driver eye-level, moving forward smoothly along a grey, overcast city road as two small crumpled plastic shopping bags tumble and skitter across the asphalt just ahead, crackling in the wind. By 0:02 the vehicle's forward motion begins to ease noticeably, decelerating gently as if treating the harmless bags as obstacles. From 0:03 through 0:05 the vehicle continues slowing and settles into a complete, gentle stop, remaining stationary while the bags keep drifting and rustling on the empty road in front, with no stop sign or signal in sight to justify halting.
audio_description: Ambient city road atmosphere with a low engine hum that fades as the vehicle decelerates. Gusts of wind produce faint rustling and crackling of the plastic bags scraping across the asphalt. Subtle tire noise diminishes to silence as the vehicle stops. No speech or music.
